author: doll-agent
content:
Add 13 domain-boundary tests in src/tests.rs:
- asin at x=-1 (symmetric +/-inf)
- asin/acos out of domain (|x|>1) → NaN/inf
- atanh at x=-1 (symmetric to +1)
- atanh outside domain: dual formula gives finite -1/3, distinct from atanh's NaN value (documents this divergence)
- acosh outside domain (x<1) → NaN
- sqrt of negative → NaN
- ln of negative: derivative is dual-formula-driven (-1) or NaN (NaN-poisoned)
- log2/log10 at zero → +inf
- ln_1p at -1 → -inf
- powf and powi with zero base + negative exponent → singular
- recip at -0.0 → singular
